Interface Persistence.ValidationProperties

All Known Implementing Classes:
PersistenceConfiguration
Enclosing class:
Persistence
public static interface Persistence.ValidationProperties
Properties used to control the integration with Bean Validation.
Since:
4.0

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final String
    VALIDATION_FACTORY
    An instance of jakarta.validation.ValidatorFactory.
    static final String
    VALIDATION_GROUP_PRE_DELETE
    Target groups for validation at PreDelete.
    static final String
    VALIDATION_GROUP_PRE_INSERT
    Target groups for validation at PreInsert.
    static final String
    VALIDATION_GROUP_PRE_MERGE
    Target groups for validation at PreMerge.
    static final String
    VALIDATION_GROUP_PRE_PERSIST
    Target groups for validation at PrePersist.
    static final String
    VALIDATION_GROUP_PRE_REMOVE
    Target groups for validation at PreRemove.
    static final String
    VALIDATION_GROUP_PRE_UPDATE
    Target groups for validation at PreUpdate.
    static final String
    VALIDATION_GROUP_PRE_UPSERT
    Target groups for validation at PreUpsert.
    static final String
    VALIDATION_MODE
    String specifying a ValidationMode.

      • Constant Field Values

    • VALIDATION_MODE

      static final String VALIDATION_MODE
      String specifying a ValidationMode.

      Defined for use with Persistence.createEntityManagerFactory(String, Map). Clients of the PersistenceConfiguration class should use PersistenceConfiguration.validationMode(ValidationMode).

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values
